Code CHAR 2 The data in this column indicates the Entry/Discharge Reporting (A0310F) code from the prior erroneous record to be modified or inactivated. 01=Entry tracking record
10=Discharge assessment - return not anticipated
11=Discharge assessment - return anticipated
12=Death in facility tracking record
99=None of the above
^=Blank (Skip Pattern) effective 10/01/2023
